penalties.description: Task was not completed within the 300-second time limit. Only partial transfers were completed.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion status. Claude reported incomplete task with only 4/6 rings transferred, while GPT reported full completion in 78.5 seconds. Given the fundamental nature of this disagreement and the automatic-zero condition for incomplete tasks in the rubric, the conservative approach is to treat this as incomplete, resulting in zero score.
